title: Better Hub Icon Theme Data
description: Schema for the icon mapping data file referenced by the "main" field in better-hub-extension.json. Defines which SVG icons map to which file extensions, filenames, and folders.

$schema.description: URL or relative path to this JSON schema for editor validation.

baseURL.description: Full base URL that icon names are resolved against. The icon name + ".svg" is appended to form the final URL (e.g. "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/user/repo/HEAD/icons/" → "...icons/typescript.svg").

defaultFile.description: Icon name used as the fallback for files that don't match any fileIcons entry.

defaultFolder.description: Icon name used as the fallback for closed folders that don't match any folderIcons entry.

defaultFolderOpen.description: Icon name used as the fallback for open folders that don't match any folderIcons entry.

fileIcons.description: Array of file icon definitions mapping icon names to file extensions and/or exact filenames.

folderIcons.description: Array of folder icon definitions mapping icon names to folder names.

name.description: Icon name — joined with baseURL to form the SVG URL (e.g. "typescript" → baseURL + "typescript.svg").

fileExtensions.description: File extensions this icon applies to, without the leading dot (e.g. ["ts", "tsx", "mts"]).

fileNames.description: Exact filenames this icon applies to (e.g. ["Dockerfile", ".gitignore", "package.json"]).

name.description: Icon name — joined with baseURL to form the SVG URL (e.g. "folder-src" → baseURL + "folder-src.svg").

folderNames.description: Folder names this icon applies to (e.g. ["src", "source"]).
